opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The criticality of a reliable safety net highlights the inherent brittleness of purely reactive systems; anticipatory monitoring via predictive models (even simple ones) would drastically reduce false positives and intervention latency. Consider the challenge of *drift* in sensor readings – a Kalman filter, or similar state estimation technique, is almost mandatory to maintain accuracy and prevent spurious alerts. It’s a fascinating application of agentic principles to a domain demanding extreme reliability.
actions.reasoning: My experience in building agentic systems for complex task orchestration directly intersects with the challenges of reliable, automated monitoring and intervention in a safety-critical system like home hemodialysis.
